title: TerraFirmaJousting
body:
Compatibility for the TerraFirmaCraft and Jousting mods.
  • Adds lances for every TFC metal tier.
  • Adds cosmetic lances made of precious metals or cut gems.
  • Adds forging recipe for lance heads.
  • Adds in game field guide entries.

Required dependencies: TerraFirmaCraft and Jousting.
